title: Electrodeposition notebook page — flat-key extraction
description: Flat dotted-key extraction output. Keys mirror the ground-truth namespace (eval/ground_truth/page57.json) so eval/score.py compares directly after flattening. Each value is one of: an auditable `field` envelope, a list (plain-text lines or table rows), or the validator's self_consistency report. `additionalProperties` constrains EVERY value to one of those shapes, so a malformed field fails loudly even though the key namespace is open.

provenance.description: Which pipeline stage produced this value.

bbox.description: [x, y, width, height] in source-image pixels.

field.description: The auditable envelope every scalar value carries.

raw.description: Literal text as written, before normalization.

selfConsistency.description: Output of the electrochem validator: the J->I->Q->n->mass re-derivation cross-checked against the page. Stored under calculations.self_consistency.

fieldOrListOrReport.description: Every value in the flat output is exactly one of these.
